product_overview: A Next.js frontend for a second‑hand marketplace that lets users discover, buy, and sell used items. It provides public product browsing and search plus authenticated buyer, seller, and admin workflows for managing listings, orders, and payouts.
core_goals: Discover products through featured listings, categories, and search
Inspect product details and contact sellers
Buy products using a cart, checkout, and payment flow
Track and manage buyer orders after purchase
Register as a seller and create or manage product listings
Provide admin interfaces to moderate products and manage accounts

features.name: Authentication and Account Recovery
features.description: Sign in and register with email/password and recover account access via a password reset request.
user_flows: Navigate to /login -> Enter credentials and submit login form -> See homepage with user signed in
Navigate to /register -> Fill registration details and submit -> See confirmation that account was created
Navigate to /forgot-password -> Enter email to request password reset -> See confirmation that reset request was sent
Navigate to /login -> Submit empty or invalid credentials -> See form validation error for required/invalid fields

features.name: Product Discovery and Search
features.description: Browse featured and curated products, filter by category, and search by keywords to find items of interest.
user_flows: Navigate to / -> Browse featured and latest listings -> Navigate to /products -> See product catalog
Navigate to /products -> Apply category or sub-category filter -> See filtered product list
Navigate to /search -> Enter search keywords and submit -> See search results matching the query
Navigate to /products -> Select a product from the listing -> See product detail information and seller summary

features.name: Cart, Checkout, and Payment
features.description: Add items to a cart, review and update quantities, provide shipping/checkout details, and complete payment to place orders.
user_flows: Navigate to /products -> Add an item to the cart -> Navigate to /cart -> See the item in cart with correct quantity and price
Navigate to /cart -> Update item quantity -> See updated line totals and cart subtotal
Navigate to /cart -> Select shipping and enter checkout details -> Submit order and proceed to payment -> Navigate to /payment -> Complete payment -> See /checkout/success with order confirmation

features.name: Buyer Order Management
features.description: View past and current orders, inspect order details and timeline, and perform post-purchase actions such as confirming receipt or cancelling when eligible.
user_flows: Navigate to /orders -> See a list of your recent orders and high-level statuses
Navigate to /orders -> Open an order from the list -> See order timeline, items, and tracking updates
Navigate to /orders -> Select an eligible order and cancel it -> See cancellation confirmation in the order list
Navigate to /orders -> Open an order and confirm received -> See order status updated to received

features.name: Seller Operations
features.description: Onboard as a seller, create and manage product listings, and review seller order and payout records.
user_flows: Navigate to /become-seller -> Complete and submit seller onboarding form -> See /become-seller/success confirming seller registration
Navigate to /sell -> Fill product title, price, description, and category -> Submit listing -> Navigate to /my/listings -> See the new listing in your listings
Navigate to /my/listings -> Select a listing to edit -> Update listing details and save -> See updated listing reflected in your listings
Navigate to /seller/orders -> Review seller order list -> Update seller order status for an order -> See updated order status reflected in seller orders

features.name: Admin Backoffice
features.description: Access admin dashboards to monitor metrics, moderate products, and manage user/seller accounts and order/refund workflows.
user_flows: Navigate to /admin -> See admin dashboard metrics and operational summaries
Navigate to /admin/products -> Review a product under moderation -> Change moderation status and save -> See the product status updated
Navigate to /admin/users -> Search for a user account -> Update account status (enable/disable) -> See confirmation of the account update

routes.description: Homepage with featured and curated listings

features.name: Authentication and Account Recovery
features.description: Email/password auth, email verification, Google email verification, and password recovery
user_interactions: Enter credentials and submit login form
Register account and verify email token
Request reset link and set a new password
Complete Google email verification when required

features.name: Product Discovery and Search
features.description: Browse products by category, sub-category, search query, and product detail
user_interactions: Browse featured and latest listings on homepage
Filter products by category and sub-category
Search by keywords
Open a product detail page

features.name: Cart, Checkout, and Payment
features.description: Manage cart items, place order, and complete payment flow
user_interactions: Add or remove cart items and update quantity
Select shipping and checkout details
Submit order and proceed to payment
View checkout success state

features.name: Buyer Order Management
features.description: View orders, tracking, and perform post-purchase actions
user_interactions: View order history
Open order detail timeline and tracking
Cancel order when eligible
Confirm received and request refund

features.name: Seller Operations
features.description: Become seller, create/manage listings, and process seller orders and payouts
user_interactions: Submit seller onboarding form
Create and update product listings
Update seller order statuses
Review wallet and payout records

features.name: Admin Backoffice
features.description: Moderate products, manage users/sellers/orders/refunds, and monitor operations
user_interactions: View admin dashboard metrics
Review and update product moderation status
Manage user and seller account status
Process order, payout, and refund operations

known_limitations.issue: Frontend requires backend APIs and valid environment values for full flows
known_limitations.impact: End-to-end flows fail if backend service or env configuration is unavailable
